elements:
Internal Elements that should've been part of the app itself
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
Additional Ability Score Improvement misc true

Custom Ability Score Decrease 1

true
Custom Ability Score Improvement Option
You can increase one of the scores by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
Custom Ability Score Improvement Option
You can increase three different scores by 1.
Your size is Tiny.
Your size is Small.
Your size is Medium.
Your size is Large.
Your size is Huge.
Your size is Gargantuan.
Your size is Colossal.
Every creature in D&D, including every player character, has a special tag in the rules that identifies the type of creature they are. Most player characters are of the Humanoid type. A race option presented here tells you what your character’s creature type is.
List of Types. Here’s a list of the game’s creature types in alphabetical order: Aberration, Beast, Celestial, Construct, Dragon, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, Giant, Humanoid, Monstrosity, Ooze, Plant, Undead. These types don’t have rules themselves, but some rules in the game affect creatures of certain types in different ways. For example, the text of the cure wounds spell specifies that the spell doesn’t work on a creature that has the Construct or Undead type.
Having More Than One Type. Some creatures are of more than one creature type. If an effect works on at least one of a creature’s types, that effect can work on that creature. For example, if you are both a Humanoid and an Undead, cure wounds works on you, since the spell works on a Humanoid.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Aberration.
Aberration.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Beast.
Beast.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Celestial.
Celestial.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Construct.
Construct.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Dragon.
Dragon.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Elemental.
Elemental.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Fey.
Fey.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Fiend.
Fiend.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Giant.
Giant.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Humanoid.
Humanoid.
Creature Type
You are a Humanoid. You are also considered a dwarf for any prerequisite or effect that requires you to be a dwarf.
Humanoid. You are also considered a dwarf for any prerequisite or effect that requires you to be a dwarf.
Creature Type
You are a Humanoid. You are also considered an elf for any prerequisite or effect that requires you to be an elf.
Humanoid. You are also considered an elf for any prerequisite or effect that requires you to be an elf.
Creature Type
You are a Humanoid. You are also considered a goblinoid for any prerequisite or effect that requires you to be a goblinoid.
Humanoid. You are also considered a goblinoid for any prerequisite or effect that requires you to be a goblinoid.
Creature Type
You are a Humanoid. You are also considered a gnome for any prerequisite or effect that requires you to be a gnome.
Humanoid. You are also considered a gnome for any prerequisite or effect that requires you to be a gnome.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Monstrosity.
Monstrosity.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Ooze.
Ooze.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Plant.
Plant.
Creature Type
Your creature type is Undead.
Undead.
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.
Additional Feature misc true
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
YYou have an additional 5 feet of climbing speed.
Additional Feature misc true
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have an additional 10 feet of climbing speed.
Additional Feature misc true

You have a swiming speed equal to your walking speed.
Additional Feature misc true

You have an additional 5 feet of flying speed.
Additional Feature misc true
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have an additional 10 feet of flying speed.
Additional Feature misc true
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have an additional 5 feet of walking speed.
Additional Feature misc true
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have an additional 10 feet of walking speed.
Additional Feature misc true
!(ID_VISION_SUPERIORDARKVISION || ID_VISION_DARKVISION)
Many creatures in the worlds of D&D, especially those that dwell underground, have darkvision. Within a specified range, a creature with darkvision can see in darkness as if the darkness were dim light, so areas of darkness are only lightly obscured as far as that creature is concerned. However, the creature can’t discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.
You can see in dim light within {{darkvision:range}} feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.
Many creatures in the worlds of D&D, especially those that dwell underground, have darkvision. Within a specified range, a creature with darkvision can see in darkness as if the darkness were dim light, so areas of darkness are only lightly obscured as far as that creature is concerned. However, the creature can’t discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.
You can see in dim light within {{darkvision:range}} feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have an additional 10 feet of darkvision.
Additional Feature misc true
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have an additional 5 feet of darkvision.
Additional Feature misc true
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have an additional 10 feet of blindsight.
Additional Feature misc true
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have an additional 5 feet of blindsight.
Additional Feature misc true

You have an additional 10 feet of truesight.
Additional Feature misc true
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have an additional 5 feet of truesight.
Additional Feature misc true
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have an additional 10 feet of tremorsense.
Additional Feature misc true
You can equip this item to “enable” it. It remains hidden from the inventory on your character sheet.
You have an additional 5 feet of tremorsense.
Additional Feature misc true
ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_CATEGORY_SIMPLE_RANGED, ID_INTERNAL_DAMAGE_TYPE_BLUDGEONING, ID_INTERNAL_WEAPON_PROPERTY_THROWN
The boomerang is a ranged weapon, and any creature proficient with the javelin is also proficient with this weapon.
On a miss, a boomerang returns to the thrower's hand.
Weapons 0 2 lb. onehand 60/120 1d4 ID_PROFICIENCY_WEAPON_PROFICIENCY_JAVELIN https://www.dndbeyond.com/equipment/boomerang
Once equipped, this item allows you to ignore Multiclass prerequisites for all of the Classes.
Note. Some (non-official) Classes are likely to be missing parts that allow for this item to work, thus still requiring you to fullfil their prerequisites.
Additional Feature misc true

[type:class]
Custom Background Ability Score Combination
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution score by 1.
Custom Background Ability Score Combination
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Intelligence score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Intelligence score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Strength, Dexterity, and Intelligence score by 1.
Custom Background Ability Score Combination
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Wisdom score by 2 and another one by 1, or increase all three by 1. None of these increases can raise a score above 20.
You can increase Strength, Dexterity, or Wisdom score by 2 and increase a different score by 1.
You increase Strength, Dexterity, and Wisdom score by 1.
